item.description: ### Added - **Per-model usage limits (optional).** A new Settings toggle, *Show per-model limits*, adds each model's weekly bar to the usage strip — Claude's per-model weekly windows and Codex Spark. It reads your existing Claude/Codex login read-only, with no sign-in, and never changes that login. Off by default; if it can't reach the data it quietly leaves your usual limits in place.
